text: You picking up Ruth for church or am I? I lost track this week
I got her. I'll swing by after I drop the chairs at the hall. Tell her 9:15 sharp, she's slow getting out the door
Lol be nice. Brisket for after?
Old Faithful's already cold-smoking. Two o'clock we eat
Dad you still want me to bring the sweet potato pie Sunday?
Bring it. Don't tell your mother, she'll say she's got it covered and then eat half
😂 say less. Bus gets in Friday night, can you grab me?
I'll be there. Text me when you're 20 out
Dad you cooking this weekend or we doing takeout
I'm cooking. Jerk chicken. You coming up Sunday?
Yeah. Can I bring Janelle?
Course. Tell her your mama already likes her more than you
Baby is dinner at yours or mine this week
Ours, Mama. You're not standing in that kitchen all day. Just bring yourself
I'll bring my greens and that's final
Yes ma'am. Wouldn't dream of stopping you
You still need the truck Friday for the chairs?
Yeah, annex closet, about forty of em. My back's done lifting, you're on the heavy end
lol old man. I got you. 5 o'clock?
5 works. I'll buy the plates after
Deacon, can you take the closing prayer Sunday? I'm still hoarse
I'll take it. Keep it short though, my standing-up time is about what it was minus the cartilage
Ha. Bless you Shawn
Hearing got moved to Thursday 2pm. You good to be there?
I'll be there. Pulling the supervisor log tonight, the timestamps don't line up
That's our whole case. Good
Coach, two kids out sick Saturday. We thin in the outfield
Can your nephew fill in for one game? Tell him it's just the one
He's in. See you at Rouge Park
Bible study moved to 7:15 this week, passing it to the deacons
Got it. I'll put it on the board Sunday so the second-shift folks see it
Thank you Shawn
Dominoes Thursday at Carlos's? Been a minute
I'm in. Last time you stuck me with the double-blank, I owe you one
😂 bring your wallet then
Thursday still on? I got the table set up
On. I'll bring the ribs, you handle the cards
Say less, see you 7
Mr. Dawson, your cholesterol numbers came back, let's talk diet at the follow-up
Doc, I already cut the brisket to once a week. The knees are the bigger fight
We'll cover the knee too. Thursday still good?
Have to push it, grievance hearing landed same morning. Any afternoon next week?
You due for a cut before the banquet? Got a Saturday slot
Take it. Keep it low, I'm not chasing the gray anymore
lol 10am Saturday then
Shawn, your garden sprinkler's been running on my fence side again
My apologies, Mr. Whitfield, I'll move the timer tonight. Bring you some tomatoes to make up for it
Now you're talking. No hard feelings
Meat's done, pick up cornbread on the way home
Ruth's water bill came, I left it on the table
Choir practice moved to 6, Pastor's kid is sick
Don't forget the truck's got 20 miles left
Marcus called, he's coming home the 20th
Grill me a burger tonight, long day at Crestwood
Committee meeting ran late, plate in fridge
Ruth wants collards Sunday, told her I'd ask you
Bank called about the mortgage overpayment, all good
Bought Jasmine's flight for Thanksgiving, arriving Wed 4:20
Furnace guy comes Saturday between 10-2
Sweet tea's out, grab a jug at Meijer
Storm coming Thursday night, tarp the smoker
Pastor Caldwell asked about you at Bible study
Denise K said her boy wants to try out for softball
Physical therapy called, can move you to Tuesday 5
Card came for anniversary from your uncle Rob
Deposit hit, budget review Saturday morning
The Crestwood kids had a tough Monday, need a quiet dinner
Insurance renewed the truck, sent you the PDF
Pastor's wife dropped off peach cobbler, don't touch it yet
Furnace guy wants $340, called my brother for a second opinion
Jasmine says her boss offered her Boston relocation
Marcus asked if you'd send $60 for books, told him wait
The clinic moved your cholesterol recheck to March 3rd
Ruth's neighbor called, her porch light's out again
The Sadie Mae reunion is May 30, mark it now
Frost warning tonight, cover the tomatoes
Church quilting group needs the fellowship hall reset
Wolverines banquet cake I ordered says pickup at 4:30
Daddy, tell Mom I want her greens for Christmas
Boss let me work remote the week before Thanksgiving
You seen the Tigers score, bullpen's a mess
Send me a pic of the birdhouse, coworker wants one
Booked the Amtrak for the 25th, in by 9pm
Grandma sounded tired on the phone Sunday, is she ok
Marketing offsite in Milwaukee next month
Miss your brisket, Chicago BBQ doesn't hit
How's Marcus, he isn't answering me
Send Mom's coleslaw recipe when you get a sec
Rent's going up $180 in January, thinking about a move
Dad, Foxpoint client cancelled and I got the afternoon off
You still hate mustard on ribs, coworker asked
Do you think Grandma would use a medical alert button
I got promoted to senior marketing coordinator 2/1
The car needs new brakes, would you look it over at Thanksgiving
I bought Mom a new cast iron for her birthday
Chicago's cold hits different, my window frame iced over
Coworker's dad worked at Detroit Diesel 32 years
Pop we need to talk kinesiology practicum options
Twisted my ankle at rec league, don't tell Mom
You watching the Lions Sunday, I'll be at Kyle's
Bio prof said my paper was solid, first time
Bringing laundry home Christmas break, sorry
Ashvale strength coach said I could shadow him spring
Card's declining, tried to buy books
Snow up here already, Detroit that bad
Coach K asked about you, said tell your dad hi
You still got my old catcher's mitt
Studying till 2am, exam Thursday
Roommate got mono, I'm avoiding the apartment
Do you still recommend that A&M shoulder mobility PDF
Group project's a mess, one guy hasn't posted
Dad how much water should I be drinking during two-a-days
Uber home from the gym, forgot my wallet at the field
Got a B- on the Chem midterm, small win
Coach let me tape at the JV game, learned a lot
Terry, that boy came to fix the porch, charged too much
Bring me the collards Sunday, I'll fry chicken
The Tigers on tonight, set my TV again please
Sister Loretta stopped by, brought a pound cake
My knee's acting up like yours, old age
Pastor visited yesterday, prayed for the neighborhood
You mowing this week, grass looking rough
Bill from Con Ed came, don't worry, I got it
The washing machine's making that grinding noise
Come by after work, front door lock is sticking
Cousin Ella called, she's moving to Southfield
Doctor said my blood pressure's holding, praise God
Bring the socket wrench Sunday, storm door hinge is loose
Comerica people called about a debit charge, sort them out
Sadie Mae Baptist has that revival Friday, I'm going
I dreamed about your father last night, plain as day
The porch swing's making that squeak, bring WD-40
Dominoes Saturday, my place, bring the sweet tea
Rumor mill: plant announced Q4 pull ahead, brace yourself
Wife's got me painting the shed, pray for me
Tigers bullpen killed me last night
Reggie's cousin got laid off at Ford Wayne
Pete's out Saturday, funeral, just three of us
You still got that spare hex socket
Detroit vs Chicago at Comerica in two weeks
Church van needs new brakes, told Linda
Carla was on the news about Local 4321 strike
Big D's grandbaby said Uncle Terry first time
You free Thursday after shift, beer at the Woodward
Maintenance overtime got cut in half
That new HR VP from Toledo is a piece of work
You seen the Piston highlight from last night
Delivery van clipped the loading dock, camera caught it
Foreman said you talked him off a ledge on the grievance
Church picnic drum kit needs to move Friday, borrow your truck
